programmes.show_description: Take a classic song and add a Clubland twist! A full 3 hours of the greatest Clubland cover versions ever in release order.
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Massive tunes and huge anthems. Each track a chart topping No.1 dance hit! This is the best of the best, these are the legends.
There have been mixes and dance tracks put together in the past, but none can outrun or equal the power of the Old Skool Number One!
Massive tunes and huge anthems. Each track a chart topping No.1 dance hit! This is the best of the best, these are the legends.
This is simply the 10 biggest hits of the Decade. Guetta, Harris, Dua, Corry and more. Let's go!
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and future classics of the twenty twenties!
Join Cascada's leading lady Natalie Horler as she talks us through all of Cascada's Dance Anthems. From 2004 - you won't want to miss this!
Melodic synths, pumping beats and shout out loud lyrics. Live your best life with some Eurodance NRG!
Starting in with the vinyl hits of 80s, the CD singles of the 90s, The downloads of the 2000s and finishing with today streaming hits. This is the evolution of dance!
German hardcore kings Scooter have been banging them out since 1994, when Swedish superstar Basshunter was just 10 years old! But will it be longevity that wins out over youth?
We've raided the Clubland vaults and decided to smash things up a bit! Enjoy some of the most awesome classics there are, mixed and smashed up to perfection.
50 songs with a feelgood factor, all from that classic era of Clubland anthems - 2000 to 2009! Get ready to Put A Donk On It!
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
We dare you not to hum along to 50 of the biggest hooks of all time! From Strike's 'U Sure Do' to Clean Bandit's 'Symphony', Robin Banks has 30 years of top tunes, back-to-back.

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
Some say trance is the greatest genre of dance music ever. Make your own mind up as we give you the definitive euphoric anthems. What's your favourite?
In order - nine hours of banging floor-fillers spanning three decades of dance! It's pretty relentless stuff, so don't say we didn't warn you.
